name: Confidence routing — low confidence → не се показва
precondition: Симулирани insights с разни confidence scores
expected_result: Pills с confidence < 0.5 не се показват в UI
Записани в DB с status='draft' или 'low_confidence'
smoke_sql: SELECT urgency, COUNT(*) AS n FROM ai_insights WHERE confidence >= 0.5 AND status = 'live' AND created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR GROUP BY urgency
